free_text: Stellar neutron capture cross sections of Nd, Pm

Time-of flight measurement of maximum neutron
Sigmas in all reaction SF6 are averaged reaction-
rate sigma*V divided by thermal velocity. To obtain
straight spectrum-averaged sigma the present result
have to be multiplied by a factor sqrt(pi)/2,
